parents.subject: LU-19095 mgc: notify MGS about LNet changes

commit.subject: LU-14459 tests: fix sanity/230p interop version check
commit.message:
LU-14459 tests: fix sanity/230p interop version check

Fix the interop version check for sanity.sh test_230p.

Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=sanity env=ONLY=230p serverversion=EXA6
Fixes: 4c2514f483 ("LU-14459 mdt: support fixed directory layout")
Fixes: 103c1f560c ("LU-18639 dne: a correct check for dir split")
Signed-off-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I5e862ff1a656e638accc74b17d68b75dc52540e5
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/60062
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Chakshu Kansal <ckansal@ddn.com>
Reviewed-by: Lai Siyao <lai.siyao@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
